question: Why did Jon decide to start his dance studio?
ground_truth: He lost his job and decided to start his own business to share his passion.
system_answer: Jon decided to start his dance studio to follow his passion for dance and turn it into a business. His determination was also fueled by losing his job, and he wants the studio to be a supportive place for all dancers.
